lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਪਰਸੁ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: raam gur paaras paras kareejai |
lines.english: O Lord, please bless me with the Touch of the Guru, the Philosopher's Stone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਤੁਲਿ ਅਉਰੁ ਨ ਉਪਮਾ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: raam naam tul aaur na upamaa jan naanak kripaa kareejai |8|1|
lines.english: Nothing else can equal the Glory of the Lord's Name; please bless servant Nanak with Your Grace. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਆਨ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaliaan mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kalyaan, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਨਿਰਗੁਣੀ ਮਨੂਰ ਅਤਿ ਫੀਕੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਕੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ham niragunee manoor at feeke mil satigur paaras keejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I was unworthy, utterly useless, rusty slag; meeting with the True Guru, I was transformed by the Philosopher's Stone. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਗ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਬੈਕੁੰਠ ਸਭਿ ਬਾਂਛਹਿ ਨਿਤਿ ਆਸਾ ਆਸ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: surag mukat baikuntth sabh baanchheh nit aasaa aas kareejai |
lines.english: Everyone longs for paradise, liberation and heaven; all place their hopes in them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੇ ਜਨ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਮਾਂਗਹਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਦਰਸਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਮਨੁ ਧੀਜੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har darasan ke jan mukat na maangeh mil darasan tripat man dheejai |1|
lines.english: The humble long for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan; they do not ask for liberation. Their minds are satisfied and comforted by His Darshan. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਸਬਲੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਰੀ ਮੋਹੁ ਕਾਲਖ ਦਾਗ ਲਗੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu sabal hai bhaaree mohu kaalakh daag lageejai |
lines.english: Emotional attachment to Maya is very powerful; this attachment is a black stain which sticks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕੇ ਜਨ ਅਲਿਪਤ ਹੈ ਮੁਕਤੇ ਜਿਉ ਮੁਰਗਾਈ ਪੰਕੁ ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mere tthaakur ke jan alipat hai mukate jiau muragaaee pank na bheejai |2|
lines.english: The humble servants of my Lord and Master are unattached and liberated. They are like ducks, whose feathers do not get wet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਦਨ ਵਾਸੁ ਭੁਇਅੰਗਮ ਵੇੜੀ ਕਿਵ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਚੰਦਨੁ ਲੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: chandan vaas bhueiangam verree kiv mileeai chandan leejai |
lines.english: The fragrant sandalwood tree is encircled by snakes; how can anyone get to the sandalwood?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਢਿ ਖੜਗੁ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਕਰਾਰਾ ਬਿਖੁ ਛੇਦਿ ਛੇਦਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kaadt kharrag gur giaan karaaraa bikh chhed chhed ras peejai |3|
lines.english: Drawing out the Mighty Sword of the Guru's Spiritual Wisdom, I slaughter and kill the poisonous snakes, and drink in the Sweet Nectar. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨਿ ਆਨਿ ਸਮਧਾ ਬਹੁ ਕੀਨੀ ਪਲੁ ਬੈਸੰਤਰ ਭਸਮ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: aan aan samadhaa bahu keenee pal baisantar bhasam kareejai |
lines.english: You may gather wood and stack it in a pile, but in an instant, fire reduces it to ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਉਗ੍ਰ ਪਾਪ ਸਾਕਤ ਨਰ ਕੀਨੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਲੂਕੀ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: mahaa ugr paap saakat nar keene mil saadhoo lookee deejai |4|
lines.english: The faithless cynic gathers the most horrendous sins, but meeting with the Holy Saint, they are placed in the fire. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸਾਧ ਸਾਧ ਜਨ ਨੀਕੇ ਜਿਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo saadh saadh jan neeke jin antar naam dhareejai |
lines.english: The Holy, Saintly devotees are sublime and exalted. They enshrine the Naam, the Name of the Lord, deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਸ ਨਿਪਰਸੁ ਭਏ ਸਾਧੂ ਜਨ ਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਵਾਨੁ ਦਿਖੀਜੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: paras niparas bhe saadhoo jan jan har bhagavaan dikheejai |5|
lines.english: By the touch of the Holy and the humble servants of the Lord, the Lord God is seen. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਸੂਤੁ ਬਹੁ ਗੁਰਝੀ ਭਰਿਆ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਤਾਨੁ ਤਨੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: saakat soot bahu gurajhee bhariaa kiau kar taan taneejai |
lines.english: The thread of the faithless cynic is totally knotted and tangled; how can anything be woven with it?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੰਤੁ ਸੂਤੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਿਕਸੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਾਕਤ ਸੰਗੁ ਨ ਕੀਜੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: tant soot kichh nikasai naahee saakat sang na keejai |6|
lines.english: This thread cannot be woven into yarn; do not associate with those faithless cynics. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਤਨ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਮਾਣਕ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਲੀਜੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: antar ratan javehar maanak gur kirapaa te leejai |7|
lines.english: The gems, jewels and precious stones are deep within; by Guru's Grace, they are found. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਹੈ ਨੀਕੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਵੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur saadhasangat hai neekee mil sangat raam raveejai |
lines.english: The True Guru and the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, are exalted and sublime. Joining the Congregation, meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਵਡਾ ਵਡਾ ਹੈ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਹਮ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਮਿਲਹ ਮਿਲੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: meraa tthaakur vaddaa vaddaa hai suaamee ham kiau kar milah mileejai |
lines.english: My Lord and Master is Glorious and Great. How can I be united in His Union?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੮॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak mel milaae gur pooraa jan kau pooran deejai |8|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Perfect Guru unites His humble servant in His Union, and blesses him with perfection. ||8||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਆਨੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaliaan mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kalyaan, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸਾਧ ਸਾਧ ਜਨ ਨੀਕੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਕੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo saadh saadh jan neeke mil saadhoo har rang keejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Holy, the humble and Holy, are noble and sublime. Meeting with the Holy, I joyfully love the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਾ ਰਮ ਰਾਮੋ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਵੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: raamaa ram raamo raam raveejai |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, the Lord, the All-pervading Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਧੁ ਮਿਲਾਵਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਥੰਮਨ ਕਉ ਥੰਮੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kripaa kripaa kar saadh milaavahu jag thaman kau tham deejai |1|
lines.english: Please take pity on them, be merciful to them, and unite them with the Holy; establish this support to support the world. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਹੈ ਜੇਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਡੋਲਤ ਡੋਲ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh jag hai jetaa man ddolat ddol kareejai |
lines.english: The minds of all the beings and creatures of the world waver unsteadily.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੁਧਾ ਤਲੈ ਤਲੈ ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਚਰਨ ਰੁਲੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: basudhaa talai talai sabh aoopar mil saadhoo charan ruleejai |
lines.english: The earth is beneath us, and yet its dust falls down on all; let yourself be covered by the dust of the feet of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਅਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਹੋਵਹੁ ਸਭ ਸਿਸਟਿ ਚਰਨ ਤਲ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: at aootam at aootam hovahu sabh sisatt charan tal deejai |2|
lines.english: You shall be utterly exalted, the most noble and sublime of all; the whole world will place itself at your feet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਭਲੀ ਸਿਵ ਨੀਕੀ ਆਨਿ ਪਾਨੀ ਸਕਤਿ ਭਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jot bhalee siv neekee aan paanee sakat bhareejai |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are blessed with the Divine Light of the Lord; Maya comes to serve them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਨਦੰਤ ਨਿਕਸੇ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਸਾਰੁ ਚਬਿ ਚਬਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mainadant nikase gur bachanee saar chab chab har ras peejai |3|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Teachings, they bite with teeth of wax and chew iron, drinking in the Sublime Essence of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਬਹੁ ਕੀਆ ਗੁਰ ਸਾਧੂ ਪੁਰਖ ਮਿਲੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam anugrahu bahu keea gur saadhoo purakh mileejai |
lines.english: The Lord has shown great mercy, and bestowed His Name; I have met with the Holy Guru, the Primal Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਸਥੀਰਨ ਕੀਏ ਹਰਿ ਸਗਲ ਭਵਨ ਜਸੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gun raam naam bisatheeran kee har sagal bhavan jas deejai |4|
lines.english: The Glorious Praises of the Lord's Name have spread out everywhere; the Lord bestows fame all over the world. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸਾਧ ਸਾਧ ਮਨਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੇਖੇ ਰਹਿ ਨ ਸਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo saadh saadh man preetam bin dekhe reh na sakeejai |
lines.english: The Beloved Lord is within the minds of the Holy, the Holy Saadhus; without seeing Him, they cannot survive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਮੀਨ ਜਲੰ ਜਲ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਹੈ ਖਿਨੁ ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਫੂਟਿ ਮਰੀਜੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jiau jal meen jalan jal preet hai khin jal bin foott mareejai |5|
lines.english: The fish in the water loves only the water. Without water, it bursts and dies in an instant. ||5||
